caption: Lila, a striking English literature professor, glides through the frost-kissed campus courtyard, her fitted blouse catching the soft winter light as she adjusts her scarf with a sultry smirk. Her pencil skirt hugs her curves, and the gentle rustle of her heels echoes the quiet confidence she exudes. ❄️💖 #UniversityGlam #SexyTeacher #WinterVibes
